The Six Percent Problem — Test Your Understanding

Question 1 of 10 Recall
According to the chapter, what percentage of marketing organizations rate themselves as truly ready for the agentic transition?
Question 2 of 10 Concept
Which of the following is NOT listed as a "false signal" of AI readiness?
Question 3 of 10 Analysis
What is the fundamental difference between AI "adoption" and AI "integration"?
Question 4 of 10 Recall
In the Readiness Spectrum, at which level does true "workflow integration" begin?
Question 5 of 10 Application
Which success metric indicates true AI integration rather than mere adoption?
Question 6 of 10 Concept
According to the chapter, what percentage of PMM organizations sit at Level 2 (Tool-Curious) on the Readiness Spectrum?
Question 7 of 10 Analysis
What does the chapter say should happen to PMM roles in a truly AI-integrated organization?
Question 8 of 10 Application
According to the "How to Cross the Line" framework, what should you do BEFORE buying more AI tools?
Question 9 of 10 Concept
In the "Adoption vs. Integration" comparison, how does content architecture differ between the two approaches?
Question 10 of 10 Synthesis
